issue.author: shao-hua-li

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Somewhat reduced:
```
define i16 @main(i1 %c, i32 %x) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %if, label %join

if:
  %g.1 = select i1 false, i32 %x, i32 1
  br label %join

join:
  %g.2 = phi i32 [ %g.1, %if ], [ 1, %entry ]
  %tobool1 = icmp ne i32 %g.2, 4
  %tobool3 = icmp ne i32 %g.2, 64
  %x1 = and i1 %tobool1, %tobool3
  %conv4 = zext i1 %x1 to i16
  ret i16 %conv4
}

; RUN: opt -instcombine

define i16 @main(i1 %c, i32 %x) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %if, label %join

if:                                               ; preds = %entry
  br label %join

join:                                             ; preds = %if, %entry
  ret i16 0
}
```

comments.author: nikic
comments.body: Problematic fold appears to be https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/e0cdafe8d4b2f1585f4756447b677fec37954ec4/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp#L1015-L1052 with `zext(1 != 64)`.

issue.title: Wrong code at -O1 on x86_64-linux_gnu

tests.test_body:
define i16 @pr57899(i1 %c, i32 %x) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %if, label %join

if:                                               ; preds = %entry
  %g.1 = select i1 false, i32 %x, i32 1
  br label %join

join:                                             ; preds = %if, %entry
  %g.2 = phi i32 [ %g.1, %if ], [ 1, %entry ]
  %tobool1 = icmp ne i32 %g.2, 4
  %tobool3 = icmp ne i32 %g.2, 64
  %x1 = and i1 %tobool1, %tobool3
  %conv4 = zext i1 %x1 to i16
  ret i16 %conv4
}
